mapper.select: SELECT id, public_id, verification_code, created_at FROM email_verification WHERE email = #{email} AND status = 'SENT' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE email_verification SET status = #{emailVerificationStatus}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{emailVerificationId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO email_verification(verification_code, public_id, status, email) VALUES (#{verificationCode}, #{publicId}, #{status}, #{email})
